title: Subagents, Parallelism, and Coordination · Failure Case: Delegation Fit
summary: Coordinate specialist agents without duplicate or conflicting work. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops delegation fit increment in a bounded multi-agent execution map. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Delegate only concrete independent work with a clear return contract.
Implement pause, cancel, revoke, and containment paths that work during tool execution.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
